fix: correct Nano Banana Pro model ID — nano-banana-pro-preview not nano-banana-pro
fix: enhance mode uses Nano Banana Pro with owner photo as reference — not Fal
feat: add styleRefUrl to MediaConfig interface for per-tenant style references
feat: lock winning enhance prompt — 'expertly plated, same bowl, blurred bg' formula
feat: prompt engine — subject detection, cuisine modifiers, style overrides, safety suffix (9/9 tests pass)
docs: image prompt engineering — simple/advanced modes, per-cuisine defaults, reference image rules, video pipeline

feat: smart image routing — Imagen 4.0 (text2img), Gemini 3.1 (reference-based), Fal (enhance/restyle)

AI-R sends 'I need a photo' + optional references. Orion decides:
- No reference → Imagen 4.0 (best food quality, free)
- Restaurant reference photo → Gemini 3.1 Flash Image (style-matched, free)
- Owner's food photo → Fal flux/dev img2img (enhance or restyle)
- Fallback → Fal text2img

Cuisine-aware prompt builder with per-cuisine plating details.
Prompt safety rules enforced (no logos, no faces, blurred backgrounds).
docs: image generation prompt engineering rules and per-cuisine defaults
docs: CFO guardrails — lessons learned, undo spec, safety rules
